title: pisum luteum
intro: Pisum luteum, also known as wild pea or yellow garden pea, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which have been attributed to its high content of isoflavones and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Pisum luteum are said to include improving cardiovascular health, reducing the risk of certain cancers, and alleviating symptoms of menopause. In herbal preparations, Pisum luteum is often used as a dried flower or leaf infusion, or as a supplement in capsule or powder form, to harness its potential therapeutic benefits.
